title: Journalism Program Learning Outcomes
content:
Journalism Program Learning Outcomes

1) Knows the concepts, theories and methodologies in the field of journalism.

2) Knows the historical and technological development of journalism profession.

3) Grasps the authorities and responsibilities in the field of journalism.

4) Knows and practices news gathering and writing processes.

5) Able to identify and explain basic problems related to journalism.

6) Analyze national, international, cultural and social effects of the media.

7) Follows the scientific and technological developments in the field of journalism and continues his/her professional development.

8) Critically evaluate his/her knowledge and skills about journalism.

9) Competently use new communication technologies in the field of journalism.

10) Takes responsibility for individual and team works in the field of journalism.

11) Follows knowledge in journalism by using a foreign language at least in the level of European Language B1 level.

12) Acts in accordance with social, scientific, cultural, and ethical values in the field of journalism.

13) Able to verify content and apply editorial control in the field of journalism.

14) Has the competence to work and produce content under time constraints.

15) Has the competence to design, implement and publish print newspapers and websites.

16) Knows the structural, managerial and technical features of the journalism field.

17) Fulfills the requirements of media literacy.

18) Aware of the working conditions of the journalism field and professional organizations.

19) Has knowledge in the fields of social sciences relevant to journalism.

20) Has the competence to produce solutions to problems in the media at an academic level.
